Home / Services / Restorative Dentistry

Restorative Dentistry

Repair damaged teeth with durable, functional solutions.

Arizona's climate can take a toll on dental work, with extreme temperature changes potentially affecting materials. Our restorative treatments use high-quality materials designed to withstand these conditions.

We provide tooth-colored fillings that resist expansion and contraction better than traditional metals. For patients with damaged teeth from sports or accidents—common in our active community—we offer crowns and bridges crafted from zirconia, which handles thermal stress exceptionally well.

Our restorative approach prioritizes both function and aesthetics, ensuring your repaired teeth blend seamlessly with your natural smile. Whether you're in historic Old Town or modern DC Ranch, we'll restore your teeth to full health and beauty.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Detailed examination and digital impressions
  2. 02 Step 2: Removal of decay or damage
  3. 03 Step 3: Custom fabrication of restoration
  4. 04 Step 4: Permanent placement and bite adjustment

Benefits

  • Materials suited for desert climate
  • Natural-looking results
  • Long-lasting durability
  • Preservation of healthy tooth structure

Frequently Asked Questions

How do your fillings hold up in extreme heat?

Can I get same-day crowns in Scottsdale?

What's the best option for replacing missing teeth?

Book an Appointment

Ready to get started with restorative dentistry? Contact us today.

Schedule Now Or call: 555-den-r91
